entity.summary: Turkey-based centralized cryptocurrency trading platform launched on February 14, 2017, offering TRY-denominated markets and related blockchain services through its active official platform.
entity.notes: Official Paribu histories give an exact trading launch date of February 14, 2017. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Turkey-based exchange service.

expected.summary: Turkey-based centralized exchange launched in 2017 and still operating under the Paribu brand.

changes.summary: Turkey-based centralized cryptocurrency trading platform launched on February 14, 2017, offering TRY-denominated markets and related blockchain services through its active official platform.
changes.notes: Official Paribu histories give an exact trading launch date of February 14, 2017. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Turkey-based exchange service.

events.title: Paribu launched for trading
events.description: Paribu launched its cryptocurrency trading platform in Turkey on 2017-02-14.
events.notes: Exact launch date is stated in multiple official Paribu histories.

events.title: Paribu entered Turkey's transitional crypto service-provider list
events.description: Turkey's Capital Markets Board included Paribu's trading-platform and custody entities in the transitional list of crypto-asset service providers that declared an intention to continue operating under the new regulatory framework.
events.notes: The regulator explicitly states that appearance on the transitional operating list does not itself constitute authorisation.

evidence.title: What is Paribu?
evidence.notes: Official project history states that Paribu launched on 2017-02-14.

evidence.title: Paribu has achieved its 4th anniversary with a daily trading volume of $1 billion
evidence.notes: Official anniversary article corroborates the 2017-02-14 trading launch.

evidence.title: Paribu official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Paribu identity and active trading platform.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Paribu
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Paribu identity, Turkey registration, and 2017 establishment year.

evidence.title: Announcement regarding crypto-asset service providers
evidence.notes: Primary regulatory announcement explains the transitional operating list and warns that inclusion is not authorisation.

evidence.title: Transitional list of operating crypto-asset service providers
evidence.notes: The current transitional list includes Paribu's trading-platform entity and a separate custody application.
